title: Learning Graph JSON Schema
description: Interactive Mermaid visualization for learning graph json schema
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: educational technology
data visualization
mermaid
learningObjectives: Identify the four main sections of the learning graph JSON format: metadata, groups, nodes, and edges
Explain how taxonomy categories defined in the groups section supply the colors and labels applied to concept nodes in vis-network
Trace how a concept dependency is encoded as an edge connecting two node identifiers
Construct a minimal valid learning graph JSON file containing metadata, one group, and a connected set of nodes and edges
